---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for MinterMC
title: "[FEATURE] <Short description>"
labels: enhancement, new feature
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## 💡 Describe the Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen. How should this feature work within the gRPC/Kernel architecture?

## 🔗 Describe Alternatives
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or diagrams about the feature request here.
